---
title: HTTP API reference
description: Studio HTTP API endpoints, methods, and payloads for developers and integrations.
---

# HTTP API reference

The Studio exposes a full HTTP API for agents, workflows, tools, runs, chat, LLM, RAG, and more. This page summarizes the API surface; the canonical endpoint list is in the repo at `contracts/server-api.md`.

**[Open API docs (Swagger UI) →](../api-docs.html)** — Browse all routes and try requests. The OpenAPI spec is autogenerated from `packages/ui/app/api` route handlers when you run `npm run build:docs`.

## Base

- **Base URL**: Configured by the client (e.g. `http://localhost:3000` when running the app locally).
- **Payloads**: JSON for request and response bodies unless noted (e.g. streaming).

## Main domains

| Domain | Endpoints (examples) |
| ------ | --------------------- |
| **Agents** | `GET/POST /api/agents`, `GET/PUT/DELETE /api/agents/{id}`, `POST /api/agents/{id}/execute`, `GET/POST/DELETE /api/agents/{id}/skills` |
| **Skills** | `GET/POST /api/skills`, `GET/PUT/DELETE /api/skills/{id}` |
| **Workflows** | `GET/POST /api/workflows`, `GET/PUT/DELETE /api/workflows/{id}`, `POST /api/workflows/{id}/execute` |
| **Tools** | `GET/POST /api/tools`, `PUT/DELETE /api/tools/{id}` |
| **LLM** | `GET/POST /api/llm/providers`, `PUT/DELETE /api/llm/providers/{id}`, `POST /api/llm/providers/{id}/test` |
| **Runs** | `GET /api/runs`, `GET/PATCH /api/runs/{id}`, `GET/POST /api/runs/{id}/logs` |
| **Chat** | `POST /api/chat` (streaming), `GET/POST /api/chat/conversations`, `GET/PUT/DELETE /api/chat/conversations/{id}` |
| **RAG** | Encoding config, document store, collections: `GET/POST/PUT/DELETE` under `/api/rag/...` |

Additional routes cover reminders, feedback, sandbox, files, backup, vault, queues, settings, OpenClaw, Telegram, and more. See the repo `contracts/server-api.md` and the Next.js API routes under `packages/ui/app/api/` for the full list and implementation.

## Request/response schemas

Detailed request and response shapes are maintained in the codebase (TypeScript types in `packages/core`, route handlers in `packages/ui/app/api/`). For shared DTOs used by the API, see [Types reference](/technical/types-reference). For function-level documentation of the runtime that backs these routes, see [Code API / Modules & functions](/technical/code-api).
